name: Country Pork Chop Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat pork chops in oil in a heavy skillet.
2. Add onions and apple. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Drain VEG-ALL, reserving liquid.
4. Stir in reserved liquid, chicken broth, and sugar; bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until pork chops are cooked, approximately 25 minutes. Remove chops.
5. Bring liquid to boil; stir in vegetables and rice. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
6. Serve pork chops on top of rice.
